title: eleutherococcus leucorrhizus var. axillaritomentosus
intro: Eleutherococcus leucorrhizus var. axillaritomentosus is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Eleutherococcus senticosus plant, commonly known as Siberian Ginseng or Eleven Flower, which is native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, and is traditionally used to boost the immune system and enhance physical performance. The health benefits of Eleutherococcus leucorrhizus var. axillaritomentosus include improved cardiovascular function, reduced fatigue, and enhanced mental clarity. Eleutherococcus leucorrhizus var. axillaritomentosus is typically prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote resilience to stress.
intro_study: According to "Voprosy onkologii", eleutherococcus leucorrhizus var. axillaritomentosus may help stimulate general non-specific resistance and immunologic vigor in patients undergoing intensive antitumor therapy.
